title: VEYLIN Christmas Window Stickers, 6 Sheet Peeping Santa & Rudolph Snowflakes Window Clings PVC Staic Stickers for Christmas Window Display
features: «¡ôéPackage: You will get 6 sheets Christmas window clings, 1 peeping Santa, 1 peeping Rudolph and 4 sheets snowflakes in different shapes, original and unique design. Stick these to make your family fill with festival.

«¡ôéSize: Santa approx 27 x 20 cm/10.5 x 7.8 inch, Rudolph approx 19 x 20 cm/7.48 x 7.8 inch, 4 sheets Xmas snowflake stickers in different size and shape 22 x 28 cm /8.6 x11 of each, is prefect for Christmas.

«¡ôéMaterial: PVC material, no-toxic, the Christmas static window clings don't need gummy and will not leave any marks. Convenient for using, 100% re-usable, flective vinyl waterproof material and the pattern is double-sided.

«¡ôéEasy to use: Just clean the smooth surface, then peel off the stickers and stick it on, done! The Christmas window stickers are easy to apply and take down. Stick it with your kids to create a sweet Xmas atmosphere.

«¡ôéWidely application: This window sticker can apply to any smooth, flat surface like glass, mirror, windows and ect. Can be used for many occasions, such as home, shop windows, restaurants. Add more Christmas atmosphere.
